title: Abacus AI Just Dropped AI SuperComputer With Claude And Gemini
summary: Abacus AI launched AI SuperComputer, a cloud environment where AI agents can build, deploy, host, and run real software. The platform provides Ubuntu, databases, storage, terminal access, SSH, GitHub, AWS, and one-click HTTPS deployment, bridging the gap between code generation and live application execution.
